vocab.meaning: chú trọng vào tính tiện dụng
vocab.example: My choice of daily carry is strictly utility-oriented, focusing on items that serve a clear, practical purpose.

vocab.meaning: những đồ thiết yếu nhỏ gọn
vocab.example: I try to streamline my pockets by only carrying compact essentials to avoid feeling weighed down.

vocab.meaning: được cất giữ một cách an toàn
vocab.example: I always ensure that my wallet and identification are securely stowed in an inner zipped compartment.

vocab.meaning: những món đồ được sử dụng thường xuyên
vocab.example: I keep high-frequency items, like my smartphone and transit card, in my most accessible pockets.

vocab.meaning: một chiếc túi gọn gàng, không lộn xộn
vocab.example: Maintaining a clutter-free bag helps me find what I need instantly without rummaging through useless scraps.

vocab.meaning: thứ bắt buộc phải có (không thể thương lượng)
vocab.example: A pair of high-quality sunglasses is a non-negotiable for me whenever I step out during the day.
With the rise of the digital wallet, I find myself carrying fewer physical cards than I used to.

vocab.meaning: sự thoải mái khi tiếp xúc (cầm nắm)
vocab.example: I carry a small worry stone in my pocket because the tactile comfort helps reduce my anxiety in crowded places.
Even in a cashless society, I still keep some spare change in my bag for vending machines or small tips.
I ditched my traditional umbrella for a foldable one because the former was too cumbersome to carry on the bus.
